ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the athlete participates in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the athlete plays (if applicable) */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Brief history of previous injuries */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer associated with the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., camera, wearable device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the data was collected in */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "x_left_hand" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left hand */,
  "y_left_hand" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left hand */,
  "z_left_hand" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the left hand */,
  "x_right_hand" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right hand */,
  "y_right_hand" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the right hand */,
  "z_right_hand" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the right hand */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data collected by the sensor */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the data point */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the environment during data collection (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_data" (
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint or body part */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the data was collected in */,
  "joint_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint or body part (e.g., elbow, shoulder) */,
  "x_left" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left joint */,
  "y_left" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left joint */,
  "z_left" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the left joint */,
  "x_right" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right joint */,
  "y_right" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the right joint */,
  "z_right" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the right joint */,
  "joint_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint type */,
  "angle_left" REAL /* Angle of the left joint */,
  "angle_right" REAL /* Angle of the right joint */,
  "velocity_left" REAL /* Velocity of the left joint */,
  "velocity_right" REAL /* Velocity of the right joint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_data_joint_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_type_id") REFERENCES joint_types ("joint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the data was collected in */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., speed, acceleration) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analytic */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the injury was detected in */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Detailed diagnosis of the injury */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, athlete) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the data was accessed in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view session, edit athlete data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "session_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session type */,
  "session_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the session type (e.g., training, competition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  "default_duration" INTEGER /* Default duration for sessions of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_types" (
  "joint_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint type */,
  "joint_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint type (e.g., elbow, shoulder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the joint type */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Anatomical location of the joint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., camera, wearable device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "supported_environments" TEXT /* Environments where the sensor can be used (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)
